text:
Pawan Khera brazenly while accusing Hemanta Sarma's wife in Assam : You do a case on me. I am waiting here in Assam only, why are you waiting for 48 hours, file a case on me today night itself !!

When Hemanta Sarma actually filed a case, Pawan Khera put his tail between his legs and ran from Assam to Delhi, and when police reached Delhi to Hyderabad.......

Heavy security deployed outside the CONgress HQ at 24, Akbar Road.

Why?

Chaprasi Pawan Khera? But he has fled to Hyderabad.

Rahul Ghandy's dual citizenship case? But hearing is on 15 Apr.

FIR against Kharge ji in Assam for alleged hate-speech against RSS-BJP?

WHY? WHAT'S UP?
